inSignal.description: Signal name that triggers quest end.

outcome.description: SlateRef<QuestEndOutcome> literal or $varName. Allowed literals: Unknown, Success, Fail, InvalidPreAcceptance.

signalListenMode.description: SlateRef<SignalListenMode?>. Allowed SignalListenMode literals: OngoingOnly, NotYetAcceptedOnly, OngoingOrNotYetAccepted, HistoricalOnly, Always; also accepts $varName.

sendStandardLetter.description: SlateRef<bool?> literal, expression, or $varName; controls completion letter.

goodwillChangeFactionOf.description: Slate variable holding the thing whose faction receives goodwill change.

goodwillChangeReason.description: HistoryEventDef def name or $varName used as goodwill-change reason.
